Interface MessageRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.cassandra.repository.CassandraRepository<Message,String>, org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Message,String>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Message,String>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Message,String>
@Repository public interface MessageRepository extends org.springframework.data.cassandra.repository.CassandraRepository<Message,String>

  • Method Details

    • findByConversationId

      org.springframework.data.domain.Slice<Message> findByConversationId(String conversationId, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

    • findMessageWithCursor

      @Query("SELECT * FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = ?0 AND created_date < ?1") org.springframework.data.domain.Slice<Message> findMessageWithCursor(String conversationId, LocalDateTime cursor, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

    • countByConversationIdAndCreatedDateAfter

      @Query("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = ?0 AND created_date > ?1") long countByConversationIdAndCreatedDateAfter(String conversationId, LocalDateTime createdDate)

    • findMessageByConversationIdAndCreatedDateAfter

      @Query("SELECT * FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = ?0 AND created_date > ?1") List<Message> findMessageByConversationIdAndCreatedDateAfter(String conversationId, LocalDateTime createdDate)

    • findTopByConversationId

      @Query("SELECT * FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = ?0 LIMIT 1") Message findTopByConversationId(String conversationId)

    • findMessageByDeleted

      @Query("SELECT * FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = ?0 AND created_date > ?1") org.springframework.data.domain.Slice<Message> findMessageByDeleted(String conversationId, LocalDateTime date, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

    • findMessageWithCursorAndDeleted

      @Query("SELECT * FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = ?0 AND created_date > ?1 AND created_date < ?2") org.springframework.data.domain.Slice<Message> findMessageWithCursorAndDeleted(String conversationId, LocalDateTime date, LocalDateTime cursor, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
